mapper.select: SELECT a.id,is_use isUse, b.money money,CASE coupon_id WHEN 1 THEN '喷漆优惠卷' WHEN 2 THEN '代驾优惠卷' WHEN 3 THEN '年检优惠卷' ELSE '优惠卷' END as `name`,validity_time toDayTime from app_user_coupon as a LEFT JOIN app_coupon_type as b ON a.coupon_id = b.id WHERE user_id = #{userid}
SELECT COUNT(0) FROM app_user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_use = 2
SELECT * FROM app_user_coupon WHERE coupon_id = #{type} AND user_id = #{userid} AND is_use = 2 limit 1
